english: [Something is killing the valley folk, and the valley has sent for you.]

context: Splash screen opening paragraph, second of three: the shape of a run
english: [You have six days. Walk the settlement, the deep wood, and the forsaken manor; trade words and watch faces; read the signs the thing cannot help but leave. Prove its name twice over, prepare its death, and take the hunt to it — or let the sixth night come, and it will take the hunt to you.]

context: Splash screen opening paragraph, third of three: what death costs
english: [Everything you learn, you keep. Even dying only costs you a day. Days are the one thing you cannot craft.]
